description: Project navigation + cross-linking across Asset Registry & Commissioning Execution. Adds a 6-item project sidebar, five entity detail routes (Asset, Space, System, AssetType, Template), URL-backed Assets filters, pathname-derived breadcrumbs, and lateral cross-links between related entities. One backend extension: template_id filter on list_instances. UI is brought into compliance with CONTEXT.md (Asset vs Equipment). See GitHub PRD issue #44.

userStories.title: Backend — list_instances template_id filter
userStories.description: As a backend developer, I need list_instances to accept a template_id filter, so that the Template detail page can show instances using a Template without a full scan.
acceptanceCriteria: Add optional template_id: str | None parameter to list_instances in backend/contexts/commissioning_execution/instances.py
Filter applies as an additional WHERE clause when provided, composes with existing asset_id/system_id/level/status filters
Expose template_id query param on the corresponding API route in backend/contexts/commissioning_execution/api.py

Extend backend/contexts/commissioning_execution/test_instances.py with cases: filter returns only matching instances, composes with status filter, unknown template_id returns empty list, RLS still honored
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Frontend — buildBreadcrumbs pure module
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need a pure function that maps pathname + project name + optional entity label to a breadcrumb trail, so that the topbar can render section-aware crumbs without React or fetch coupling.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/contexts/navigation/breadcrumbs.ts exporting buildBreadcrumbs(pathname, projectName, entityLabel?) returning an array of { label, href|null }
Recognizes /project/[id], /project/[id]/{spaces,asset-types,systems,assets,test-procedure-templates,members} and their /[entityId] children
Last crumb has href=null; earlier crumbs have hrefs that navigate one level up
Module has no react, next, or fetch imports
Create frontend/src/contexts/navigation/breadcrumbs.test.ts (vitest, table-driven) covering project root, every list page, every detail route with and without entity label
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Frontend — useUrlFilters deep hook
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I need a pure hook that adapts URLSearchParams to a typed Assets filter object, so that the Assets list filters can be URL-backed and bookmarkable.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/contexts/asset_registry/useUrlFilters.ts exporting useUrlFilters() returning { filters, setFilter, clearFilter, clearAll }
Supported filter keys: status, space, system, type, parent
setFilter writes via Next router replace with merged params; clearFilter removes the param; clearAll removes all five
Unknown query params on the URL are preserved on writes (do not strip)

Create frontend/src/contexts/asset_registry/useUrlFilters.test.ts with vitest using a mock router; cover empty object yields no params, round-trip each key, clear removes a single key, clearAll removes all five, unknown params preserved
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Frontend — Project sidebar nav (6 entries) + drop Equipment link
userStories.description: As a Cx Engineer inside a Project, I want a sidebar listing every CRUD surface, so that I can reach Spaces, Asset Types, Systems, Assets, Test Procedure Templates, and Members in one click.
acceptanceCriteria: Update frontend/src/app/(app)/layout.tsx so that when pathname starts with /project/[id], the sidebar renders 6 project entries: Spaces, Asset Types, Systems, Assets, Test Procedure Templates, Members
Each entry highlights as active when pathname prefix-matches its href (e.g., /project/X/assets/Y highlights Assets)
The legacy Equipment sidebar link is removed
Top-level Inbox and Projects links remain unchanged
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Frontend — Topbar breadcrumbs wired to buildBreadcrumbs
userStories.description: As any user, I want the topbar to show Project › Section › Entity derived from the URL, so that I always have a path back up.
acceptanceCriteria: Replace the hardcoded 'Project' breadcrumb in frontend/src/app/(app)/layout.tsx with a Breadcrumbs component that consumes buildBreadcrumbs from US-002
Project name is fetched once when on a /project/[id]/* route and passed to the component
Detail pages supply their resolved entity label via a React context the topbar reads — define and export this context
Clicking a non-terminal crumb navigates to its href; the terminal crumb is not a link
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Frontend — Dashboard label cleanup (Equipment → Asset)
userStories.description: As an Owner viewing the Project dashboard, I want the headline stats labelled in Asset vocabulary, so that the dashboard agrees with CONTEXT.md.
acceptanceCriteria: In frontend/src/app/(app)/project/[id]/page.tsx, rename 'Equipment Progress' → 'Asset Progress' and 'Equipment Status' → 'Asset Status'
Do not touch the run.equipment_type display string (legacy DB column, separate PRD)
Do not touch the /equipment page file itself

userStories.title: Frontend — Asset detail route /assets/[assetId]
userStories.description: As a Cx Engineer, I want each Asset to have its own page with its Points and TestProcedureInstances inline, so that I can deep-link to it.
acceptanceCriteria: Create frontend/src/app/(app)/project/[id]/assets/[assetId]/page.tsx
Page fetches the Asset, its AssetType, Space, parent Asset (if any), child Assets, and System memberships
Body reuses the existing AssetDetail component plus embedded PointList and InstanceList
Page renders clickable links: AssetType → /asset-types/[id], Space → /spaces/[id], parent Asset → /assets/[id], each child Asset → /assets/[id], each System membership → /systems/[id]
Page supplies its entity label (Asset tag) into the breadcrumb context from US-005
Clicking an Asset row in the existing AssetList navigates to this detail route
Extend frontend/src/contexts/asset_registry/ui.test.tsx with a case: AssetList row click target href is /project/[id]/assets/[assetId]
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Frontend — Wire Assets list to useUrlFilters + tree cross-link affordances
userStories.description: As a Cx Engineer, I want Assets list filters backed by URL params so that tree clicks deep-link into filtered views and I can bookmark filters.

Add a 'View Assets in this System' affordance to SystemTree nodes that navigates to /project/[id]/assets?system=[systemId]
Manually navigating to /project/[id]/assets?space=X&status=retired pre-fills filters and shows the expected list
